title: eriogonum wrightii var. oresbium
intro: Eriogonum wrightii var. oresbium, also known as the Red Stems Mormon Tea, is a variety of the Mormon Tea plant, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, making it beneficial for treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Eriogonum wrightii var. oresbium include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
